title: Maxillaria squarrosa

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Maxillaria squarrosa belonging to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Maxillaria is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Central and South America, and Maxillaria squarrosa is a species within this genus.
